name: template: g-ts-006 (Strict tsconfig flags) detector treats templates/tsconfig.strict.json as the canonical "correct" flag set
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/_dispatch.sh" --rule g-ts-006 --print-canonical 2>out.txt && grep -E "templates/tsconfig.strict.json" out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
